productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Shirts
description: Composition White shirt made of 67% linen and 33% cotton, with a tipped collar, full front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, pocket on left chest with embroidered Big Ben logo and a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Add immense style to your semi-formal look with this white shirt from united colors of benetton. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full arm sleeves add a touch of regality to your personality. Pair it with jeans or corduroys and suede shoes for that perfect look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
